reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer parada viajdo desde Córdoba. Los sanitarios en óptimas condiciones. Cuenta con un lindo predio de descanso con mesas y bancos bajo.la sombra de eucaliptos. El personal es muy amable. Además para los socios ACA, el agua caliente es gratuita

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop while traveling from Córdoba. The restrooms are in excellent condition. It has a nice rest area with tables and benches shaded by eucalyptus trees. The staff is very friendly. Hot water is also free for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdG9pZWVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien atendido y lugar cuidado. Siempre que voy a cordoba es mi parada para almorzar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and a well-maintained place. It's always my lunch stop whenever I go to Cordoba.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcXRLMHZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños muy sucios, si venis de Bs As por Autopista 9 Córdoba Rosario no hay nada antes, entonces ves el cartel enorme que dice que a 2km tenes un Aca YPF, y vas con expectativas jaja. Increíble que no hagan un control de limpieza. Y la puerta del baño de mujeres pesa y se cierra fuerte  atrás tuyo, trata que no te agarre el talón. Necesita arreglo esa puerta. Aclaro que los baños de hombres también estaban muy sucios. Lo único muy lindo es que tenes árboles y mesas y sillas de cemento para descansar o comer algo. Eso suma al menos para poder seguir viaje. La limpieza es importante, ojalá lo mejoren.

(Translated by Google)
Very dirty bathrooms. If you're coming from Buenos Aires via Highway 9, Córdoba-Rosario, there's nothing before that. Then you see the huge sign that says there's a YPF (YPF) stop 2km away, and you go in with high expectations, haha. It's incredible they don't do a cleanliness check. And the women's restroom door is heavy and slams shut behind you; try not to catch your heel. That door needs fixing. I should clarify that the men's restrooms were also very dirty. The only nice thing is that there are trees and cement tables and chairs to rest or eat something. That at least helps you continue your journey. Cleanliness is important; I hope they improve it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdFByQzFRRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio muy tranquila. Concurrencia baja ya que está en la ruta 9 vieja. Fácil acceso desde la ruta 9 nueva, hay que desviarse 5 minutos. El momento en el que pasamos tenia los baños un poco sucios (el de hombres). Tiene buena parquización con mesas y bancos bajo sombra, para comer o tomar mate. No tiene tanto lugar el estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
Very quiet gas station. Low traffic since it's on the old Route 9. Easy access from the new Route 9; you just have to turn off for 5 minutes. When we were there, the restrooms were a bit dirty (the men's). It has nice grounds with tables and benches in the shade, perfect for eating or drinking mate. Parking is limited.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHNnJhb0pREAE
